arts.ttl: 'What he needs to know is': Joe Cole sends message to Cole Palmer after Chelsea star failed to score again in tonight's win
arts.sum: Chelsea are through to the Europa Conference League quarter-finals after beating FC Copenhagen 3-1 on aggregate. The Blues won 2-1 in Denmark last week to...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca gets vindication over key Chelsea problem - but still faces battle to convince supporters
arts.sum: Chelsea were not at their fluent attacking best against Copenhagen, but it is four wins in a row across all competitions

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Copenhagen TV details - live stream, Conference League kick-off time
arts.sum: The match will be broadcast live in the UK on TNT Sports 4, with coverage beginning at 7pm GMT ahead of the 8pm GMT kick-off. TNT Sports subscribers can watch the match via a live stream on the Discovery+ website and app.

arts.ttl: Dewsbury-Hall ensures Chelsea ease past FC Copenhagen but doubts remain
arts.sum: The Conference League is supposed to be where Chelsea live a little. This is a long way below Europe’s elite and fans expect their team to overwhelm opponents who operate in much smaller financial circles. They are waiting for Enzo Maresca to prove that his positional play can dazzle. This was another strange Stamford Bridge occasion. The mood was muted, even though Chelsea advanced to the last eight by beating FC Copenhagen 3-1 on aggregate. A fourth consecutive win in all competitions was not without its complications and that meant the doubts around Maresca are not going away before Sunday’s trip to Arsenal. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chelsea advance past FC Copenhagen despite woeful first-half display
arts.sum: Chelsea moved into the UEFA Conference League quarter-finals with a 3-1 aggregate victory over FC Copenhagen after earning a 1-0 win in the second leg despite not having a shot during a dreadful first-half performance at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Copenhagen starting lineups: Enzo Maresca makes surprise decisions for Conference League fixture
arts.sum: Chelsea and Copenhagen confirm their starting lineups for the second leg of their Conference League last-16 tie on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: FC Copenhagen to Release Special 150th Anniversary Kit in 2026
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can exclusively leak that Adidas will release a special shirt to celebrate the 150th anniversary of Copenhagen (1876-2026) in 2026.

arts.ttl: Palmer benched for Chelsea vs FC Copenhagen LIVE!
arts.sum: And he also said there was positive news on Romeo Lavia's return towards full fitness - although he is not in the Conference League squad. Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca has confirmed Cole Palmer, Reece James and Christopher Nkunku are back in training after illness.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca names the Chelsea legend he was most like during his career, Blues fans absolutely love him
arts.sum: Will Maresca ever become as popular as him?

arts.ttl: 'No respect' - Chelsea star fires Joao Felix message as AC Milan make £45m transfer decision - football.london
arts.sum: Despite having played such a key role in Sérgio Conceição's side, Felix has struggled to impress - so much so that Milan have decided they will not try to sign the Chelsea loanee on a permanent basis in the summer - according to Italian outlet Calciomercato . The 25-year-old forward, who Chelsea signed from Atletico Madrid in the summer for £45m, has struggled to impress since joining AC Milan on loan .
